findings.message: Lazy-loaded components without ErrorBoundary — chunk load failures crash the app
findings.fix: Wrap lazy components in an ErrorBoundary with graceful fallback.
findings.test_context: UI scanner: checking lazy-loaded components for error boundaries
findings.reproduction: Open dashboard/app/src/App.tsx. React.lazy() or lazy() is used but no ErrorBoundary wraps the component.
findings.expected_behavior: Lazy-loaded components should be wrapped in ErrorBoundary for graceful failure handling
